body:
## CTO Checkpoint

- [NOR-82](/NOR/issues/NOR-82) successfully checked out (lock issue resolved).
- Screens for Jan Meier (16:30 CEST) and Klara Hoffmann (17:30 CEST) require board/human action — AI agent cannot conduct live interviews independently.
- [NOR-82](/NOR/issues/NOR-82) is now `blocked` pending board direction on whether to provide candidate materials for async evaluation or conduct screens and share notes.
- [NOR-85](/NOR/issues/NOR-85) (website location question) completed this heartbeat.

Will resume immediately when board provides interview notes or candidate materials on [NOR-82](/NOR/issues/NOR-82).
